hero.title: AI Product Engineer
hero.subtitle: I design and ship user-facing AI features end to end — chat UIs, streaming, tool calls, RAG-backed flows.

aiProduct.title: AI Product Design
aiProduct.description: I design and ship the front of your AI product — chat UIs, streaming responses, tool-call surfaces, agent flows, and eval dashboards. From Figma to production code.

frontend.title: Frontend Engineering
frontend.description: I build production-ready frontends in Vue / Nuxt + Tailwind + TypeScript. Pixel-perfect, accessible, and fast. From Figma handoff to deployed app.

llmIntegration.title: LLM Integration
llmIntegration.description: I wire LLMs into real product workflows — RAG, agents, tool calling, structured outputs, n8n automations. Built to ship, measured with evals.

web3.title: Web3 Frontend
web3.description: I craft clear, intuitive Web3 experiences — DeFi dashboards, NFT marketplaces, wallet apps. Built with Wagmi, Viem, and Reown.

projects.pageIntro: A curated collection of my design and development work. Each project represents a unique challenge and a creative solution.

caseStudy.comingSoonBody: For now, explore the work directly via Figma or the live preview above.

web3Quote.quote: Recently, I've been diving deeper into the blockchain ecosystem, building wallet integrations and decentralized UI flows.
web3Quote.highlight: wallet integrations and decentralized UI flows
web3Quote.context: I focus on crafting clear, intuitive Web3 experiences with tools like Wagmi, Viem, and Web3Modal. From DeFi dashboards to NFT marketplaces and wallet applications, I'm always excited to collaborate on innovative ideas and projects.

about.heading: About
about.designCodeBody: I mix solid design principles with practical, efficient development to create clean, responsive, and pixel-perfect interfaces. I take care of the whole process — from early research to prototypes to bringing everything to life with smooth, modern code.
about.softBody: Autonomous work, active listening, attention to detail, clear communication, collaborative mindset, adaptability

writing.title: Notes from shipping AI products
writing.intro: Practical lessons from designing and shipping LLM-powered features, frontend craft, and Web3 product work. First posts landing soon — in the meantime, here's what I'm writing about.
writing.ctaText: Want first dibs on new posts?

streaming.title: Designing streaming responses in Vue
streaming.blurb: A no-flicker streaming chat UI in Nuxt: chunk parsing, smooth typing, and graceful tool-call rendering.

ragEvals.title: Evaluating RAG retrieval quality
ragEvals.blurb: A practical RAG eval setup — what to measure, how to score, and the dashboard I use to track regressions.

figmaVue.title: The Figma → Vue handoff I actually use
figmaVue.blurb: Tokens, components, and the small conventions that keep design and code in sync without a process tax.

defiUi.title: Building a DeFi swap UI users don't fear
defiUi.blurb: How I reduced visual noise in CaveSwap while still exposing the data power users need.

brief.title: Get a personalized brief
brief.intro: Describe what you want to build in your own words. I'll generate a real project brief in 30 seconds — scope, timeline, price range, and what I'd ship first.
placeholderRotation: We're a Solana validator and need a delegator dashboard with on-chain reward claims…
I want to add a smart chat to my SaaS that can answer questions about our docs…
We need to redesign our DeFi swap UI to feel less intimidating to new users…
I have a startup landing page idea and need it shipped in two weeks…

chipPrefills.defi: We're a small Solana validator and need a dashboard where our delegators can view staking stats, claim rewards, and see validator performance.
chipPrefills.ai: We have a B2B SaaS and want to add an AI chat that can answer questions about our docs and our customer data, with citations.
chipPrefills.brand: I'm launching a developer tools startup and need a clean, fast landing page with pricing, docs structure, and a sign-up flow.

brief.footnote: Powered by Claude · Free · No signup to generate

email.headline: Want the full proposal?
email.body: Drop your email and I'll send the brief plus a calendar link to chat about it.
email.errorInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid email.
email.errorGeneric: Something went wrong sending the email. Try again in a bit?

errors.tooShort: Add a bit more — at least 20 characters so I can map it to a real brief.
errors.rateLimited: You've hit today's limit. Reach me by email and we'll talk it through.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again, or reach me by email.
